class.name: FmodAudioEffectDelay
class.brief_description: Delay/echo effect with dual taps and feedback support.
class.description: FmodAudioEffectDelay creates echo and delay effects by delaying the audio signal and mixing it back with the original. It features two independent delay taps with configurable delay time, level, and panning, plus a feedback loop for creating repeating echoes. Use this effect to create simple echoes, rhythmic delays, or ambient spaces.

method.name: get_dry
method.description: Returns the dry (unprocessed) signal level.

method.name: get_feedback_delay_ms
method.description: Returns the delay time for the feedback loop in milliseconds.

method.name: get_feedback_level_db
method.description: Returns the output level of the feedback loop in decibels.

method.name: get_feedback_lowpass
method.description: Returns the lowpass filter cutoff frequency for the feedback loop.

method.name: get_tap1_delay_ms
method.description: Returns the delay time for tap 1 in milliseconds.

method.name: get_tap1_level_db
method.description: Returns the output level for tap 1 in decibels.

method.name: get_tap1_pan
method.description: Returns the stereo panning position for tap 1 (-1.0 to 1.0).

method.name: get_tap2_delay_ms
method.description: Returns the delay time for tap 2 in milliseconds.

method.name: get_tap2_level_db
method.description: Returns the output level for tap 2 in decibels.

method.name: get_tap2_pan
method.description: Returns the stereo panning position for tap 2 (-1.0 to 1.0).

method.name: is_feedback_active
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the feedback loop is active.

method.name: is_tap1_active
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if tap 1 is active.

method.name: is_tap2_active
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if tap 2 is active.

method.name: set_dry
method.description: Sets the dry (unprocessed) signal level.

method.name: set_feedback_active
method.description: Enables or disables the feedback loop.

method.name: set_feedback_delay_ms
method.description: Sets the delay time for the feedback loop in milliseconds.

method.name: set_feedback_level_db
method.description: Sets the output level for the feedback loop in decibels.

method.name: set_feedback_lowpass
method.description: Sets the lowpass filter cutoff frequency for the feedback loop. Lower values create darker, more muffled echoes.

method.name: set_tap1_active
method.description: Enables or disables tap 1.

method.name: set_tap1_delay_ms
method.description: Sets the delay time for tap 1 in milliseconds.

method.name: set_tap1_level_db
method.description: Sets the output level for tap 1 in decibels.

method.name: set_tap1_pan
method.description: Sets the stereo panning position for tap 1 (-1.0 = left, 1.0 = right).

method.name: set_tap2_active
method.description: Enables or disables tap 2.

method.name: set_tap2_delay_ms
method.description: Sets the delay time for tap 2 in milliseconds.

method.name: set_tap2_level_db
method.description: Sets the output level for tap 2 in decibels.

method.name: set_tap2_pan
method.description: Sets the stereo panning position for tap 2 (-1.0 = left, 1.0 = right).

members.member: If [code]true[/code], the feedback loop is active, creating repeating echoes.
The delay time for the feedback loop in milliseconds.
The output level for the feedback loop in decibels.
The lowpass filter cutoff frequency for the feedback loop in Hz. Lower values create darker echoes.
If [code]true[/code], tap 1 is active and produces output.
The delay time for tap 1 in milliseconds.
The output level for tap 1 in decibels.
The stereo panning position for tap 1. Range: -1.0 (left) to 1.0 (right).
If [code]true[/code], tap 2 is active and produces output.
The delay time for tap 2 in milliseconds.
The output level for tap 2 in decibels.
The stereo panning position for tap 2. Range: -1.0 (left) to 1.0 (right).
